name: Slip-And-go-Down Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 7 or 8 slices of bacon, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil and mash the potatoes.
2. Salt and pepper the mashed potatoes.
3. Fry the bacon until browned, then remove from heat and add vinegar.
4. Shred the lettuce.
5. Chop the scallions or onion.
6. Mix the shredded lettuce and chopped onions together.
7. Pour the lettuce mixture over the cooled bacon.
8. Toss to wilt it further.
9. Mix into the hot mashed potatoes.
Source: Home Tested Recipes Chatelaine ch.
